other_observers: Paul Slingsby, Gwen Moore, Kiki Widjaja and other DFO birders
description: Observed these two birds in an area directly across from the Park Rangers residence at this Ft. Collins openspace area.  Was part of a group of Denver Field Ornithologist that were on a Larimer/Weld county field trip.  This bird has been seen at multiple times at this location within the last few months.  A bird had been seen last year at this same location.  These birds were down on the banks and in shallow water in a stream that flows through this area.  This area is heavily wooded with cottonwoods and other wetland shrubs.  These birds were observed foraging the muddy banks for some food source.  They moved about very slowly and did not make an audible sounds that we could here.
